sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44261" key="e)u/+klwstos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐΰκλωστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44261.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">well-spun</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χιτών</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg003.perseus-grc1:203" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.AP.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">203</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίνον, νῆμα</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.33</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maec.</author> </bibl>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1474.tlg001:284" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">284</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
